argv: A glossy empire-red KitchenAid Artisan tilt-head stand mixer sits on a cream marble counter; a sudden cloud of fine white flour blooms upward as a mass of pale dough drops into the polished stainless bowl; the front badge is out of focus and unreadable; medium-close framing, 50 mm full-frame macro, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-brown palette with a single KitchenAid-red accent, gentle 35mm film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Two clean hands gently lower the tilt-head of an empire-red KitchenAid Artisan stand mixer down over its polished stainless bowl; the curved housing locks into place with a precise mechanical motion; fingers rest briefly on the chrome lever; the front badge is out of focus and unreadable; medium-close framing, 50 mm full-frame macro, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-brown palette with a single KitchenAid-red accent, gentle 35mm film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Extreme macro inside a stainless stand-mixer bowl: a spiral chrome dough hook rotates slowly through pale, soft bread dough; the dough folds over itself, catches the spiral, and starts climbing the spindle; sticky strands flex and stretch; medium-close framing, 50 mm full-frame macro, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-brown palette with a single KitchenAid-red accent, gentle 35mm film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Extreme macro of a chrome wire whip turning slowly inside a chilled stainless bowl; heavy cream lifts and folds into glossy stiff peaks; thick white ribbons trail off the wires and fall back into the bowl in slow motion; medium-close framing, 50 mm full-frame macro, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-brown palette with a single KitchenAid-red accent, gentle 35mm film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait
intimate domestic-warm, gentle solo piano arpeggio building into a soft string pad, unhurried morning kitchen feel, no drums, soft and patient

A linen-wrapped hand pulls a deep, dark-crusted round sourdough loaf out of a hot home oven; bright steam rises and catches the light; the crust glows with golden caramelized contrast; medium-close framing, 50 mm full-frame macro, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-brown palette with a single KitchenAid-red accent, gentle 35mm film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Wide vertical kitchen shot: a finished dark-crusted sourdough loaf sits on a worn wooden cutting board with a small linen napkin and a serrated bread knife beside it; in the soft-focus background sits a glossy empire-red KitchenAid Artisan stand mixer; warm morning window light from camera-left; the front badge of the mixer is out of focus and unreadable; medium-close framing, 50 mm full-frame, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-brown palette with a single KitchenAid-red accent, gentle 35mm film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait
